title: Dummy test issue
body:
## Issue description

This is a dummy test issue created to verify the issue creation workflow (`pending-issues/` JSON mechanism) is functioning correctly.

## High-level requirements / Expected behavior

- The `process-issue-requests.yml` workflow should pick up this JSON file when merged to `main`.
- A corresponding GitHub issue should be created automatically.
- The JSON file should be deleted from `pending-issues/` after processing.

## Additional notes

- No code changes are required.
- This issue exists solely to test the automated issue creation pipeline.
- Can be closed immediately after confirming the workflow succeeded.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The JSON file is committed to `pending-issues/` and merged to `main`.
- [ ] The `process-issue-requests.yml` workflow runs without errors.
- [ ] A GitHub issue with this title and body is created in the repository.
- [ ] The JSON file is automatically deleted from `main` after processing.
